headline: Empire Q3 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Empire (TSE:EMP.A) executives said the grocer delivered “solid” third-quarter fiscal 2026 results, supported by performance across formats and tighter cost control, while also taking several strategic actions that management said will reset its e-commerce cost structure and support profitable growth
